history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, wavy hair is sitting on a motorcycle. He is wearing a black leather jacket with zippers on the sleeves and a black t-shirt underneath. A silver necklace is visible around his neck. He is holding the handlebars of the motorcycle, with a black helmet with the "KYT" logo resting on the tank in front of him. The background shows a building with a dark metal garage door on the left and a light-colored, ribbed metal door on the right, with some electrical conduits and a meter box on the wall between them. The ground is paved with cobblestones. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with a green-tinged light illuminating the scene from the left, casting shadows and highlighting the textures of the leather and the motorcycle. The overall mood is cool and slightly brooding.
